title: Incident Response Overview
body: Start with triage, identify customer impact, assign an owner, and keep status updates factual.

title: Platform Postmortem: Production Outage
body: The outage was triggered by a Terraform security group change. Rollback restored the previous ingress rule.

title: Production Terraform Change Procedure
body: Production Terraform changes require a plan, peer review, approval, and an audit entry before apply.

title: ACME Customer Impact Note
body: ACME saw elevated payments API latency and delayed settlement reconciliation during the incident.

title: Support Outage FAQ
body: Support should tell customers engineers identified elevated latency and are monitoring recovery.
